message:
🌱 Add argo-rollouts: Traffic management for kong ingress controller and kuma mission (#1125)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-rollouts-782-traffic-management-for-kong-ingress-controller-and-kuma",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-rollouts: Traffic management for kong ingress controller and kuma",
+    "description": "Traffic management for kong ingress controller and kuma. Requested by 47+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo-rollouts deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo-rollouts version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts\nhelm list -n argo-rollouts 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working argo-rollouts installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-rollouts configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-rollouts configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-rollouts\n```\nCurrently I see that only the below are supported\n* Istio\n* Nginx Ingress Controller\n* AWS ALB Ingress Controller\n* Service Mesh Interface (SMI)"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Traffic management for kong ingress controller and kuma",
+        "description": ",  ,  ,  \n\nFull example with Kong via the Gateway API can be found here https://github.com/argoproj-labs/rollouts-plugin-trafficrouter-gatewayapi/tree/main/examples/kong\n\nAny feedback welcome\n```yaml\nminikube addons disable ingress\nhelm install kong kong/kong --set proxy.type=NodePort\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts\nkubectl get events -n argo-rollouts --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Traffic management for kong ingress controller and kuma\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": ",  ,  ,  \n\nFull example with Kong via the Gateway API can be found here https://github.com/argoproj-labs/rollouts-plugin-trafficrouter-gatewayapi/tree/main/examples/kong\n\nAny feedback welcome",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "minikube addons disable ingress\nhelm install kong kong/kong --set proxy.type=NodePort"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-rollouts",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "argo-rollouts"
+    ],

+      "Ingress"
+    ],

+    ],

+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
